hypotheses.name: Numbered 1..5 with rank-weighted typographic scale
hypotheses.rationale: Retained concept from v1 numbered-priority-list. v1 used constant 28pt for all 5 numerals — no rank scaling, no hierarchy delivered. v2 corrects: rank-weighted scale 36/30/24/20/16pt (geometric series, smallest 16pt clears the 10pt body floor).
hypotheses.expected_outcome: Higher transport — eye lands on #1 first by design.

hypotheses.name: Manifesto single statement in registered Vollkorn Italic
hypotheses.rationale: Retained concept from v1 manifesto-single-statement. v1 specified Vollkorn Black (non-italic) which is NOT in shared/ci.yml::fonts — only Vollkorn Black Italic is. v2 uses the registered italic face and drops the v1 footer that contradicted single-statement ownership.
hypotheses.expected_outcome: Polarising — the reader either reads the whole panel or skips it entirely.

hypotheses.name: Three items separated by thin Dunkelgrün rules
hypotheses.rationale: Retained concept from v1 asymmetric-editorial-rules. v1 used 5 rows × 22mm = 110mm packed into 130mm panel (~15% whitespace, below the hcd #3 30% floor). v2 reduces to 3 items, leaving ~49% body-area whitespace while preserving the thin-rule separator and intentional right-third whitespace.
hypotheses.expected_outcome: Higher appeal among design-literate raters; editorial composition.
